description: Style NoteBlack is irresistible, no matter what time of the year it is. This full sleeved top by arrow makes for ideal evening wear. You could wear it at a gathering of friends or a semi-formal bash with a pair of fitted jeans, stilettos and long earrings.Product DetailsBlack round neck top with an embroidered neck line, dotted weaves, long gathered sleeves with binding and an elasticated hemMaterial and CareBody 56% viscose & 44% cotton and trim 100 % cottonDry clean onlySize and FitBlouse fitThe model (height 5'8&rdquo and chest 33&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
